articles.title: Russia was behind arson attacks targeting PM, BBC reveals
articles.description: Evidence shows Russians directing the plot and stoking tensions with fake far-right and Muslim groups.

articles.title: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
articles.description: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.

articles.title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
articles.description: A government spokesman tells the BBC that the current offer "does not do enough to protect consumers or the environment".

articles.title: Married at First Sight Australia allegations 'disturbing', says country's watchdog
articles.description: The claims also prompted a response from UK media regulator Ofcom, who called them "deeply concerning".
